---
title: "Annie Hall Cudlip"
---

## Annie Hall Cudlip

**Dates:** (1836-1918)

**Maiden name:** (Thomas)

### Description

novelist

### Biography

Well-known for her rather risky fiction, she married (1867) the Rev. Pender Hodge Cudlip (1835-1911) curate of Yealmpton, near Puslinch, but CMY did not feel her fiction was sufficiently reformed by her marriage.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 22 [1869]
- Letter from 16 July [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
